title: Principal Radiologist at Narayana Health South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Narayana Health South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Radiologist to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
